name: APC Back-UPS 850VA / 450W UPS Battery Backup & Surge Protector - 120V - 9 Outputs (NEMA 5-15R) - 2 USB charging ports (2.4A shared) - 1.5m Power Cord - 3-prong right-angle wall outlet (NEMA 5-15P) - Wall Mount (BE850G2)
shortName: APC Back-UPS 850VA / 450W UPS Battery Backup & Surge Protector - 120V
description: An 850VA compact wall-mount UPS with dual USB charging ports and 9 outlets for home and small office power backup.
